TEST.0.title: Codebusters 2026 Division B Regional Test # 8
TEST.0.customHeader:
Names of participants: (Please print neatly)

 
 
 
School Name:

Check your team:  ◻ Varsity     ◻ JV1     ◻ JV2     ◻ JV3

Warning: Do not open this packet until given permission to do so.

Note: There are useful notes after this page.

CIPHER.465.cipherString: Science is not a game in which arbitrary rules are used to decide what explanations are to be permitted.
CIPHER.465.question: Your solar-powered calculator started flashing this Aristocrat sequence—it's Michael Behe's words. What does it say?
CIPHER.465.author: Michael Behe

CIPHER.449.cipherString: Beware of the man who won't be bothered with details.
CIPHER.449.question: A mysterious QR code on the back of a cereal box leads to this encrypted quote by William Feather using the Fractionated Morse Cipher. You are told that the quote has EBOTH in it corresponding to the encoded text R S U I W B A, meaning A = ●×●; B = ●●●; I = –––; R = ×●×; S = ×–●; U = ●●×; W = ×–×. What does it say?
CIPHER.449.author: William Feather

CIPHER.443.cipherString: At some point, you just pull off the Band-Aid and it hurts, but then its over and you're relieved.
CIPHER.443.question: Your smart fridge started flashing this cryptic message at 3 a.m. It's by John Green encoded in an Aristocrat using a K1 alphabet. You are told that the cipher contains OFF. What does it say?
CIPHER.443.author: John Green

CIPHER.454.cipherString: I must be willing to give up what I am in order to become what I will be.
CIPHER.454.question: Found on a microchip inside a disassembled robotics kit: this Porta Cipher by Albert Einstein using a keyword of SIXTH. What does it say?
CIPHER.454.author: Albert Einstein

CIPHER.446.cipherString: It's amazing how stress keeps you trim.
CIPHER.446.question: You receive this cryptic message from the future through an online time capsule. It's a quote by Peter Andre, written in a Baconian. You are told that the cipher text DRUMS EVERY MONTH FUZZY decodes to be SAMA. What does it say?
CIPHER.446.author: Peter Andre

CIPHER.445.cipherString: Todos tenemos el poder de tomar pequeñas decisiones que pueden cambiar el curso de nuestras vidas para siempre.
CIPHER.445.question: A quote by Oscar Auliq-Ice in Spanish has been encoded using the Xenocrypt Cipher using a K1 alphabet for you to decode. You are told that the cipher starts with TODOS. What does it say?
CIPHER.445.author: Oscar Auliq-Ice
CIPHER.445.translation: We all have the power to make little choices that can change the course of our lives forever.

CIPHER.458.cipherString: Art is the concrete representation of our most subtle feelings.
CIPHER.458.question: Written in glow-in-the-dark ink on the ceiling of the bio lab, uncover this Nihilist Substitution quote by Agnes Martin with a keyword of TANKER and polybius key of COMPLAINTS. What does it say?
CIPHER.458.author: Agnes Martin

CIPHER.444.cipherString: The only way to maintain a moderate sum of happiness in this life, is not to worry about the future or regret the past too much.
CIPHER.444.question: A message was left on the whiteboard after science club. It's a quote by Mel Gibson encoded using a Patristocrat using a K1 alphabet. You are told that the cipher ends with MUCH. What does it say?
CIPHER.444.author: Mel Gibson

CIPHER.462.cipherString: Art is the daughter of freedom.
CIPHER.462.question: A note falls out of a borrowed library book. The message is a quote by Friedrich Schiller, written as an Affine Cipher with a=17 and b=18. What does it say?
CIPHER.462.author: Friedrich Schiller

CIPHER.455.cipherString: He will win who knows how to handle both superior and inferior forces.
CIPHER.455.question: Hidden in the source code of a retro video game, this Complete Columnar puzzle reveals a quote from Total War: Shogun 2. The quote has RFOR somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.455.author: Total War: Shogun 2

CIPHER.461.cipherString: No tree falls at the first blow.
CIPHER.461.question: The cafeteria receipt printed a German Proverb using the Affine cipher with a=7 and b=6. What does it say?
CIPHER.461.author: German Proverb

CIPHER.460.cipherString: Nothing puzzles me more than time and space; and yet nothing troubles me less, as I never think about them.
CIPHER.460.question: You stumble across this encoded text on an old floppy disk labeled “Project Discovery.” It's a quote by Charles Lamb encoded as a Caesar. What does it say?
CIPHER.460.author: Charles Lamb

CIPHER.448.cipherString: Night had come on like the closing of a great but gentle eye.
CIPHER.448.question: The following odd symbols were found when a tomb was opened, but you recognized it as the handiwork of a prankster who scratched a quote by Ray Bradbury on the wall using a Baconian alphabet. What does it say?
CIPHER.448.author: Ray Bradbury

CIPHER.451.question: Someone taped a piece of paper with this sequence onto the back of a trophy from last year's Science Olympiad. It's a quote, written using a Cryptarithm Cipher. What do the values 53708 724061 940428 decode to?

CIPHER.447.cipherString: There is so little time. We need to make every moment count.
CIPHER.447.question: Someone left this coded message in the school lab. You are told it's a quote by Shannon Delany encoded with a Baconian. What does it say?
CIPHER.447.author: Shannon Delany

CIPHER.450.cipherString: Happiness comes from within, not from without.
CIPHER.450.question: Your school's intercom crackled to life with static… then spelled out this Fractionated Morse message by David DeNotaris. You are told that the quote has NESSCO in it corresponding to the encoded text F N O S Z R W L, meaning F = –●×; L = –×–; N = ●×●; O = ●●×; R = ●–●; S = ●●●; W = ×––; Z = ××–. What does it say?
CIPHER.450.author: David DeNotaris

CIPHER.459.cipherString: Identify a challenge in your area and see how best you can help.
CIPHER.459.question: Astronomers notice this repeating sequence in deep-space data. It's actually a quote by Lillian Nkosazana Moremi, encoded with an Atbash. What does it say?
CIPHER.459.author: Lillian Nkosazana Moremi

CIPHER.442.cipherString: With my talent, I can make people laugh and give them another attitude about life. What a blessing that is for me.
CIPHER.442.question: You discover a scrap of paper tucked inside an old lab notebook. It contains a quote by Doris Roberts encoded as an Aristocrat using a K1 alphabet. What does it say?
CIPHER.442.author: Doris Roberts

CIPHER.463.cipherString: Poetry is what is lost in translation. It is also what is lost in interpretation.
CIPHER.463.question: A coded message appears after you shine a UV light on a classroom poster. It turns out to be a quote by Robert Frost, encrypted using a Checkerboard with a polybius key of SOUVENIR. What does it say?
CIPHER.463.author: Robert Frost

CIPHER.457.cipherString: Any tomorrow that will count must start from today.
CIPHER.457.question: A mysterious app update added this Nihilist Substitution lock screen—it's actually Bamigboye Olurotimi's quote with a keyword of AVOID and polybius key of MASCULINE. What does it say?
CIPHER.457.author: Bamigboye Olurotimi

CIPHER.464.cipherString: True happiness is not found in people, places, or things. It is found in our own hearts.
CIPHER.464.question: Etched into the surface of a melted vinyl record, you found this Checkerboard-encrypted quote by Avijeet Das with a polybius key of NIGHTMARE. What does it say?
CIPHER.464.author: Avijeet Das

CIPHER.441.cipherString: Flowers always make people better, happier, and more helpful they are sunshine, food and medicine for the soul.
CIPHER.441.question: Your school-issued Chromebook's login screen hijacked itself with this Aristocrat quote from Luther Burbank. What does it say?
CIPHER.441.author: Luther Burbank

CIPHER.453.cipherString: There is always room for improvement, always. Everything can be improved.
CIPHER.453.question: Archaeologists unearth a stone tablet inscribed with a message. It's a quote by Mapi León encoded as a Porta using a keyword of RUBY. What does it say?
CIPHER.453.author: Mapi León

CIPHER.456.cipherString: Not everything in life is achievable by a straight path.
CIPHER.456.question: Someone passed you a piece of paper with this Complete Columnar encoded quote by Priyanka Agarwal. The quote has IFEISAC somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.456.author: Priyanka Agarwal

CIPHER.452.question: A mysterious postcard arrives from an unknown sender. It contains a coded quote, written in a Cryptarithm. What do the values 3811478 9538602 decode to?
